title: Recommended Blogs & Websites for Machine Learning
html:
Recommended Blogs & Websites for Machine Learning

Curated list of free blogs, websites, and online resources for learning and staying updated with machine learning.

Core ML Blogs

1. Towards Data Science (Medium)

  • Focus: Data science, ML, AI articles
  • Why: Largest collection of ML articles, diverse topics
  • Link: Towards Data Science

2. Machine Learning Mastery

  • Focus: Practical ML tutorials
  • Why: Step-by-step guides, code examples
  • Link: Machine Learning Mastery

3. Distill.pub

  • Focus: Interactive ML explanations
  • Why: Beautiful visualizations, interactive articles
  • Link: Distill

4. Google AI Blog

  • Focus: Google's ML research and products
  • Why: Latest research, product updates
  • Link: Google AI Blog

5. OpenAI Blog

  • Focus: OpenAI research and developments
  • Why: Cutting-edge AI research, GPT updates
  • Link: OpenAI Blog

Research & Papers

6. Papers With Code

  • Focus: Research papers with code implementations
  • Why: Find papers, see implementations, track SOTA
  • Link: Papers With Code

7. arXiv

  • Focus: Preprint research papers
  • Why: Latest research before publication
  • Link: arXiv

8. Google Scholar

  • Focus: Academic papers and citations
  • Why: Find papers, track citations, authors
  • Link: Google Scholar

9. Semantic Scholar

  • Focus: AI-powered research tool
  • Why: Better search, paper recommendations
  • Link: Semantic Scholar

Practical Tutorials

10. Real Python

  • Focus: Python tutorials, including ML
  • Why: High-quality Python content
  • Link: Real Python

11. Analytics Vidhya

  • Focus: Data science tutorials, competitions
  • Why: Practical tutorials, Indian perspective
  • Link: Analytics Vidhya

12. KDnuggets

  • Focus: Data science news, tutorials
  • Why: Industry news, tutorials, job postings
  • Link: KDnuggets

13. DataCamp Blog

  • Focus: Data science tutorials and tips
  • Why: Practical tutorials, career advice
  • Link: DataCamp Blog

Specialized Topics

14. Jay Alammar's Blog

  • Focus: Visual explanations of NLP/Transformers
  • Why: Best visualizations of complex concepts
  • Link: Jay Alammar

15. Lil'Log (Liliana Weng)

  • Focus: Deep learning, reinforcement learning
  • Why: Comprehensive technical blog posts
  • Link: Lil'Log

16. Sebastian Ruder's Blog

  • Focus: NLP research and tutorials
  • Why: NLP expert, research insights
  • Link: Sebastian Ruder

17. Chris Olah's Blog

  • Focus: Neural network interpretability
  • Why: Deep insights into how neural networks work
  • Link: Chris Olah

MLOps & Production

18. MLOps.community

  • Focus: MLOps practices and tools
  • Why: Industry best practices, tool comparisons
  • Link: MLOps Community

19. Weights & Biases Blog

  • Focus: Experiment tracking, ML engineering
  • Why: Practical MLOps insights
  • Link: W&B Blog

20. Neptune.ai Blog

  • Focus: ML experiment management
  • Why: MLOps tutorials, best practices
  • Link: Neptune Blog

News & Industry

21. The Batch (DeepLearning.AI)

  • Focus: Weekly AI newsletter/blog
  • Why: Curated AI news, research highlights
  • Link: The Batch

22. AI Research (MIT Technology Review)

  • Focus: AI research news and analysis
  • Why: Latest research, expert analysis
  • Link: MIT Tech Review AI

23. VentureBeat AI

  • Focus: AI industry news
  • Why: Business perspective on AI
  • Link: VentureBeat AI

Learning Platforms

24. Fast.ai Blog

  • Focus: Practical deep learning
  • Why: Top-down approach, practical tips
  • Link: Fast.ai Blog

25. Hugging Face Blog

  • Focus: Transformers, NLP, latest models
  • Why: Model releases, tutorials, research
  • Link: Hugging Face Blog

26. PyTorch Blog

  • Focus: PyTorch updates, tutorials
  • Why: Official PyTorch content
  • Link: PyTorch Blog

27. TensorFlow Blog

  • Focus: TensorFlow updates, tutorials
  • Why: Official TensorFlow content
  • Link: TensorFlow Blog

Math & Theory

28. Jeremy Kun's Blog (Math ∩ Programming)

  • Focus: Math for programmers
  • Why: Clear math explanations for ML
  • Link: Math ∩ Programming

29. Inference (Distill.pub)

  • Focus: Statistical inference, probability
  • Why: Clear statistical concepts
  • Link: Inference

Career & Community

30. Data Science Central

  • Focus: Data science community, articles
  • Why: Large community, diverse topics
  • Link: Data Science Central

31. r/MachineLearning

  • Focus: ML discussions, papers, news
  • Why: Active community, latest discussions
  • Link: Reddit r/ML

32. r/datascience

  • Focus: Data science discussions
  • Why: Career advice, project discussions
  • Link: Reddit r/datascience

How to Use These Resources

Daily Reading

  • Towards Data Science: Browse trending articles
  • Papers With Code: Check latest SOTA results
  • Google AI Blog: Stay updated with Google research

Weekly Deep Dives

  • Distill.pub: Read one interactive article
  • Jay Alammar: Deep dive into NLP concepts
  • Chris Olah: Understand neural networks

Learning Specific Topics

  • Machine Learning Mastery: Step-by-step tutorials
  • Analytics Vidhya: Practical projects
  • Real Python: Python-specific ML content

Tips

  1. Use RSS Feeds: Subscribe to blogs you like
  2. Bookmark Favorites: Save articles for later
  3. Take Notes: Summarize key learnings
  4. Practice: Implement ideas from articles
  5. Share: Discuss interesting articles with others

Tip: Don't try to read everything. Pick 3-5 blogs that match your interests and reading schedule, then explore others as needed!
